name: fast-response-optimizer
description: Response speed optimizer for OpenClaw - implements reply-first-then-process, parallel tool calls, and memory file caching
author: opendolph

description.en: Optimize response speed from 5-20s to <1s with caching and parallel execution
description.zh: 通过缓存和并行执行将响应速度从5-20秒优化到<1秒
